name: Easy Cranberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine the glaze, berries, and orange juice.
2. Heat over medium-high heat until boiling.
3. Reduce heat to low and cook for 10 minutes, stirring often, until the berries are soft.
4. Remove from heat and pour into a bowl.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
6. (For sweeter sauce) Stir in sugar if desired.
7. Serve with cooked pork, ham, or poultry.
8. Refrigerate any remaining sauce. Makes about 3 cups of sauce.
